_comment: Rule table keyed by 'soilType|season' (lowercase). Each entry is a ranked list of crop suggestions.

loamy|summer.reason: Loamy soil with good drainage suits tomato root systems well in warm weather.
Okra tolerates summer heat and thrives in well-drained loamy soil.
Warm season crop that performs well in loamy, moisture-retentive soil.

loamy|winter.reason: Cool season crop that thrives in fertile loamy soil.
Loose loamy soil allows straight, well-formed carrot roots.
Winter legume that fixes nitrogen and grows well in loam.

loamy|monsoon.reason: Handles monsoon humidity well with good loamy drainage.
Monsoon rainfall provides natural irrigation for paddy in loam-clay mix.
Vigorous monsoon grower suited to loamy soil with good organic matter.

clay|summer.reason: Clay retains water well, ideal for paddy cultivation.
Deep clay soil supports sugarcane's heavy water and nutrient needs.

clay|winter.reason: Clay-loam retains moisture well for winter wheat growth.
Winter legume tolerant of moderately heavy clay soils.

clay|monsoon.reason: Waterlogged clay during monsoon is ideal for paddy.

sandy|summer.reason: Sandy soil drains fast, well suited to melons in summer.
Sandy loam allows easy pod development for groundnut.

sandy|winter.reason: Loose sandy soil supports straight root growth.
Fast-draining sandy soil suits quick-growing radish.

sandy|monsoon.reason: Sandy soil with monsoon rain avoids waterlogging for chilli roots.

black|summer.reason: Black cotton soil retains moisture ideal for cotton in summer heat.

black|winter.reason: Black soil's water retention benefits winter wheat.

black|monsoon.reason: Black soil with monsoon rainfall is classic soybean growing terrain.

default.reason: Adaptable crop that performs reasonably across most soil and season combinations.
Low-maintenance leafy crop suitable as a fallback recommendation.
